heading: Director and staff of the Museum
label: 80r–4 Director and staff of the Museum

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Museum shall have a Director who shall be appointed by the Secretary, taking into consideration individuals recommended by the Council.

children.heading: Duties
children.label: 2 Duties
children.text: The Director shall manage the Museum subject to the policies of the Board of Regents.

children.heading: Staff
children.label: b Staff
children.text: The Secretary may appoint two additional employees to serve under the Director, except that such additional employees may be appointed without regard to the provisions of title 5 governing appointments in the competitive service.

children.heading: Pay
children.label: c Pay
children.text: The employees appointed by the Secretary under subsection (b) may be paid without regard to the provisions of chapter 51 and subchapter III of chapter 53 of title 5 relating to classification of positions and General Schedule pay rates.
